title: Cambodia & the Temple Network
summary: The record's power center — calendar temples on the stargate grid, a portal under the Mekong, and the Khmer treasury in the global reset.
markdown:
**Cambodia** is the record's holy land — the place where its mythology, its practice, and
its founder's story all touch ground. Eight sessions treat the kingdom as an active node
rather than a backdrop.

The temples are machinery. The Draco governor [Alvin Seyha](/lore/reptilians/) — whose
own colony the record places beneath Angkor — describes his people's charge over *"the
Gridpoints in that [Stargate](/lore/stargate/) network of the many different Calendar
Structures that you call 'Temples'... A Pyramidal structure, built as to mirror time."*
Angkor's own [quantum computer](/lore/quantum-computer/) has its entry; around it, the
record adds a hidden door — *"Under (the) Mekong River is a Portal to our World."*

Even the record's financial mythology routes through the kingdom: the December 2023
[NESARA](/lore/nesara-gesara/) session claims that treasure *"from the Kingdom of
Cambodia, the Khmer civilization... was combined to help create the global reset."*

And of course the record itself was born there — at the apex of Angkor Wat, in
[Kosol's founding account](/lore/kosol-ouch/), twenty minutes and thirty-two years long.
In this cosmology, Cambodia is not where the story happens; it is where the story plugs
in.
